title: Horizon's ToolKit
description: It seems your bucket has leaked
body:
Did you always need a Bucket, but there was no Iron? Then this mod is for you, because it adds a Wooden Bucket! You can get it already in the first minute of the game, but not everything is so simple. Soon your Bucket may leak, and if there is lava in it, it will burn up altogether!

Also in the future, new ideas will be added that do not fit into any of our projects at the moment.


Come join us!

[Discord](https://discord.gg/sJayn3BYDh)
